arts.ttl: Everton make Sean Dyche sack decision before Aston Villa clash as Jose Mourinho watches on
arts.sum: Everton have sacked manager Sean Dyche before Wednesday's Premier League clash against Aston Villa . And the Merseyside club have now made the decision to part company with Dyche, hours before Thursday night's FA Cup clash against Peterborough.

arts.ttl: Report: How Borussia Dortmund reacted after learning Aston Villa's asking price for Jhon Duran
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are the latest club to join the race for Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran having enquired about how much a deal would cost....

arts.ttl: Ipswich agree £20m deal for Villa winger Philogene
arts.sum: Aston Villa winger Jaden Philogene is set for a medical at Ipswich Town before a £20m move to the club.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery sets sights on winning FA Cup
arts.sum: Villa begin their campaign against Premier League rivals West Ham on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa honour 150th anniversary at Villa Park
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. West Ham United - Fri, Jan 10th 2025, 20:00 Aston Villa will continue the club's 150th anniversary celebrations at Friday night's FA Cup third-round tie against West Ham United. It promises to be a special occasion for everyone asscociated with the club and our local communities, with various matchday items also priced at £1.50 to honour our 150-year history. Additionally, matchday entertainment will create an electric environment for friends and families alike to come together at Villa Park. The evening’s festivities will emphasise the club’s commitment to families and community, making it an inclusive and memorable occasion for all Villans. Fans are encouraged to arrive early on matchday to soak in the celebratory atmosphere and enjoy the special promotions available throughout Villa Park. 150th anniversary at Villa Park null Matchday Refreshments £1.50 on draught Carlsberg £1.50 on bottled Carlsberg in areas that don’t offer draught Carlsberg £1.50 on all pies and sausage rolls (including PieTanics) £1.50 on all soft drinks and water, including bottles where draught is not available Merchandise Selected scarfs, beanies and caps will be priced at £1.50 in the Villa Store The 1,874th customer to visit the Villa Store will receive a special gift Shuttle Service Shuttle buses from Birmingham city centre to Villa Park will operate at a fare of £1.50 Commemorative Programme Special edition matchday programme will be available for £1.50, celebrating 150 years of Aston Villa (fans are advised to bring correct change where possible) T&C's Merchandise offers available at the Villa Park megastore only (excludes hospitality and matchday stores) Selected products only, subject to availability One £1.50 item per customer As the item is in a promotion, no further discount can be applied and it cannot be used in conjunction with any other offer Supporters are reminded to drink alcohol responsibly Terms and conditions apply Limited spaces remain in hospitality and GA+ areas for this historic occasion. You can be there at Villa Park to take in all the action and celebrate in style, with hospitality packages starting from £180. Our options offer more choices than ever before, giving you access to a host of exclusive experiences and upgrades that will make your matchday truly unforgettable. 150th anniversary match Matchday Packages

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about transfers, Jaden Philogene sale, John McGinn injury and West Ham
arts.sum: Unai Emery sat down with the media at Bodymoor Heath on Friday afternoon ahead of Aston Villa's FA Cup third round clash against West Ham on Friday evening. “Of course, we are playing a lot of matches, and I think if they decided to avoid playing replays, it’s because the people with the responsibility decided it is better for the competition, better for the clubs and better for how we are adding a lot of matches in different competitions, even in competitions for the countries.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set Jhon Duran transfer fee 'few teams' can afford
arts.sum: Aston Villa have released a special commemorative kit to celebrate the club's 150th anniversary - and you can get your hands on one now. Borussia Dortmund have balked at the fee Aston Villa are demanding for in-form striker Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: West Ham transfer news: Could Hammers kick-start Graham Potter reign with signing of Man United outcast?
arts.sum: Graham Potter's West Ham United reportedly join the race for a Manchester United player who is expected to leave Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery answers John McGinn injury question ahead of West Ham clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery didn’t give an updated timeline on John McGinn’s return from injury, but did confirm that he is ruled out of the club's FA Cup third round clash against West Ham on Friday. They'll play a total of seven matches in 22 days from when they face West Ham in the cup to playing Wolves at Molineux at the start of February.

arts.ttl: Replacing Haaland, fishing and a transfer deficit - inside track on Aston Villa target Donyell Malen - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Aston Villa are closing in on a move for Borussia Dortmund winger Donyell Malen, with reports suggesting all that remains in what would be an eye-catching transfer is an agreement over the fee with the Bundesliga outfit. You could also reasonably argue that after Erling Haaland, who was with BVB between 20-22 and scored 62 times in 67 games, the expectations weighed very heavily on players in attack, including Donny.
